title: Noun に限ったことではない
titleEn: Indicates that something is not only limited to; not only, not just
structure: Noun + に限ったことではない
structureEn: Noun + に限ったことではない
explanation: Dùng để nói vấn đề hoặc hiện tượng không chỉ giới hạn ở Noun. Có thể hiểu là “không riêng gì Noun”. Cấu trúc: Noun + に限ったことではない.
explanationEn: This grammar point is used to express that the statement is not only limited to the noun mentioned before it. In English, it can be translated as not only, not just, or sometimes not necessarily. It underscores that what is being said is also true for other things or situations, not just for the specific noun stated
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun に限ったことでもない
titleEn: Not limited to; not just, not exclusively
structure: Noun + に限ったことでもない
structureEn: Noun + に限ったことでもない
explanation: Dùng để nhấn mạnh rằng điều đang nói không chỉ xảy ra với Noun, mà còn có ở những trường hợp khác. Sắc thái gần với に限ったことではない. Cấu trúc: Noun + に限ったことでもない.
explanationEn: The grammar point Noun に限ったことでもない typically expresses that something is not only limited to a specific instance or category. It insinuates that there are also other instances or categories involved. In English, it can be translated as not limited to, not just, or not exclusively
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun に限る
titleEn: Expresses the idea that nothing but, nothing is better than
explanation: Dùng để nói Noun là lựa chọn tốt nhất hoặc phù hợp nhất trong tình huống đó. Có thể hiểu là “không gì bằng Noun”. Cấu trúc: Noun + に限る.
explanationEn: The noun に限る grammar point is used to express the idea that there is nothing better than the noun mentioned in the specific context. It is often used to give personal opinions, advice, or recommendations
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun ぬいた Noun
titleEn: Expresses the idea of taking something out from something else
explanation: Dùng để nói một danh từ đã được loại trừ khỏi tổng thể hoặc khỏi danh sách đang xét. Mẫu này tương đương “trừ Noun ra”. Cấu trúc: Noun1 + をぬいた + Noun2.
explanationEn: This grammar point is used to denote the action of removing or taking out one thing from another. It is usually used with nouns
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun + ぬいて（nuite)
titleEn: This is a way to express minus or except for some specific noun
explanation: Dùng để nói ngoại trừ Noun, không tính Noun vào phạm vi đang xét. Có thể hiểu là “không kể”, “trừ”. Cấu trúc: Noun + ぬいて.
explanationEn: The grammar point Noun + ぬいて is used when you want to exclude a certain noun from the whole or mention something about everything else except for a specific noun. Its usually translated in English as minus or except for
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: ～ぬく
titleEn: Expresses the concept of doing something completely or thoroughly
explanation: Dùng sau thân ます để nói làm một việc đến cùng, làm trọn vẹn hoặc vượt qua đến cuối. Sắc thái nhấn mạnh sự kiên trì hoặc hoàn tất. Cấu trúc: Verb-stem + ぬく.
explanationEn: Noun ぬく is a phrase that conveys the idea of doing an action thoroughly or completely. It demonstrates a determination to carry out a task until the end. While the formation commonly uses verbs, it does convey a meaning similar to the English phrase to do completely
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun+のいかんだ
structure: Noun + のいかんだ/Noun + のいかんでは
structureEn: Noun + のいかんだ/Noun + のいかんでは
explanation: Dùng để nói kết quả phụ thuộc vào nội dung, tình trạng hoặc mức độ của Noun. Mẫu này trang trọng, thường gặp trong thông báo hoặc văn bản chính thức. Cấu trúc: Noun + のいかんだ/Noun + のいかんでは.
explanationEn: The のいかんだ(Noun no ikan da) grammar point is used to express that something depends on a particular situation or fact. It can be translated as Depends on or up to in English. The construction no ikan is usually used with nouns and naru verbs
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun のいかんでは
explanation: Dùng để nói tùy vào Noun mà kết quả có thể thay đổi. Sắc thái trang trọng, gần với “tùy theo”. Cấu trúc: Noun + のいかんでは.
explanationEn: The のいかんでは grammar point is used when you want to express that the outcome or decision hinges on the condition described in the noun preceding this phrase. It can be translated as depending on ___ or it depends on ___ in English
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun のいかんにかかわらず
structure: Noun + のいかんにかかわらず
structureEn: Noun + のいかんにかかわらず
explanation: Dùng để nói không phụ thuộc vào Noun, bất kể Noun như thế nào. Mẫu này rất trang trọng. Cấu trúc: Noun + のいかんにかかわらず.
explanationEn: The phrase Noun のいかんにかかわらず is used to express that something is the case irrespective of a certain condition. It can be translated as regardless of or irrespective of in English. This phrase is used with nouns
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun のいかんによっては
titleEn: Depending on the matter; depending on noun
structure: Noun + のいかんによっては
structureEn: Noun + のいかんによっては
explanation: Dùng để nói tùy vào Noun mà có thể xảy ra một kết quả khác, thường là kết quả đáng chú ý hoặc cần lưu ý. Cấu trúc: Noun + のいかんによっては.
explanationEn: The phrase のいかんによっては (no ikan ni yotte wa) is used to express the concept of depending on the matter or situation. It is used to indicate that the outcome may change based on the condition or quality of the noun (matter) in question
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)
